title: Cool Rain
description: Creates ambient sounds for certain blocks during rain
body:
# This mod adds dynamic sounds to blocks during rain fall. It currently supports sounds for the following:
- Rain on glass
- Rain on water
- Rain on lava / magma
- Rain on foliage
- Rain on metal blocks
- Rain on wool

The mod also now includes additional stormy wind sounds, and ambient thunder as of 1.4.0

  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mS6cPI0qkjs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
**The sounds will change in volume depending on how far you are from the blocks, and the sounds will change dependant on the blocks surrounding you.**

With the introduction of midnight lib, all blocks can now be added or removed from any of the different sounds. The volume of each sound can also be changed with mod menu configuration!


Feel free to add this mod to your modpack!
